name: observepoint-revenue
description: ObservePoint revenue-team tooling: find-accounts (surface ranked in-territory prospects), research-account (qualify a prospect into a scored ICP dossier), owned-properties (discover an org's web properties for scoping), scope-calculator (page count to usage to live price to proposal + evidence workbook), branding-guide (ObservePoint brand source of truth, branded-doc maker, brand checker, live-site drift check), and op-mcp-post-mortem (report & remediate OP MCP server defects).
